div.head: The Chargé in Estonia (Leonard) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 82. I have been informed confidentially that the visit of the Soviet official mentioned in my telegram No. 80Dated July 2, 5 p.m., not printed; it advised of the second visit of Andrey Alexandrovich Zhdanov to Tallinn, where his presence caused uneasiness (740.0011 E. W. 1939/4356). is in connection with the (1) extension of coast and island defenses and reorganization of the Estonian Army, (2) elections to be held for Parliament and (3) possible change in the person of the President of Estonia, probably after the elections.
Dates of elections not yet announced but will probably be held soon, after which radical political changes may be expected.
